Injuries • Bludgeoning • Battered And Bruised Ballet

Injury Card

Battered And Bruised Ballet

Amidst the chaos of battle, your movements resemble a battered and bruised ballet, choreographed by the unseen hands of your adversaries. Each step becomes a delicate balance between grace and agony, as you dance to the tune of bludgeoning blows.

Treatment

Engaging in gentle physical therapy and maintaining a balanced diet can assist in recovery from the battered and bruised ballet. Rest and gradual reintroduction to physical activity are recommended to prevent setbacks.

Details

  • Category: Bludgeoning

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 4 Hit Points

  • Duration: 50

  • Status Effect: none

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • journaltype: injury

  • category: Bludgeoning

  • odds: 40

  • foldername: Injuries

  • title: Battered And Bruised Ballet

  • imagetitle:

  • image: icons/magic/earth/strike-fist-stone.webp

  • description: Amidst the chaos of battle, your movements resemble a battered and bruised ballet, choreographed by the unseen hands of your adversaries. Each step becomes a delicate balance between grace and agony, as you dance to the tune of bludgeoning blows.

  • treatment: Engaging in gentle physical therapy and maintaining a balanced diet can assist in recovery from the battered and bruised ballet. Rest and gradual reintroduction to physical activity are recommended to prevent setbacks.

  • severity: Minor

  • damage: 4

  • duration: 300

  • action: Apply the Bludgeoning Injury

  • statuseffect: none

Injuries • Bludgeoning • Bone Rattle

Injury Card

Bone Rattle

Your entire skeletal structure rattles with each movement, causing discomfort and the occasional eerie sound effect.

Shook Skeleton
Treatment

Consult a skilled cleric or wizard to realign your bones and provide some magical stability.

Details

  • Category: Bludgeoning

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 10 Hit Points

  • Duration: Permanent

  • Status Effect: Restrained

Metadata

Injuries • Bludgeoning • Bruised Ego

Injury Card

Bruised Ego

Your confidence takes a hit along with your body. Each attempt to impress or intimidate others is met with an uncomfortable reminder of your recent defeat.

Painful Pride
Treatment

A boost to morale from companions or a swift victory in combat may help restore your shaken confidence.

Details

  • Category: Bludgeoning

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 7 Hit Points

  • Duration: 20

  • Status Effect: Frightened

Metadata

Injuries • Bludgeoning • Clobbered Conundrum

Injury Card

Clobbered Conundrum

A relentless barrage of blunt force assaults your senses, turning each impact into a cacophony of concussive chaos. It's like being caught in a tempest of blows, struggling to find solid ground amidst the whirlwind of strikes.

Treatment

Seeking immediate medical attention and rest are crucial to address the aftershocks of the clobbered conundrum. Monitoring for signs of concussion and taking precautions to prevent further head trauma are paramount.

Details

  • Category: Bludgeoning

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 6 Hit Points

  • Duration: 70

  • Status Effect: Stunned

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • category: Bludgeoning

  • treatment: Seeking immediate medical attention and rest are crucial to address the aftershocks of the clobbered conundrum. Monitoring for signs of concussion and taking precautions to prevent further head trauma are paramount.

  • duration: 420

Injuries • Bludgeoning • Cranial Cacophony

Injury Card

Cranial Cacophony

Every thought feels like a cacophony of confusion in your head. Concentration on spells or complex tasks becomes an exhausting endeavor.

Bumbling Brains
Treatment

Complete silence and a mental breather can help calm the chaos in your mind.

Details

  • Category: Bludgeoning

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 11 Hit Points

  • Duration: Permanent

  • Status Effect: Confused

Your armor now sports a massive dent, reducing its protective properties but granting you a bit of extra character.

Injuries • Bludgeoning • Pulpy Palm

Injury Card

Pulpy Palm

One of your hands is mangled, making it painful and difficult to hold or wield objects effectively.

Squished Hand
Treatment

Soak the hand in healing herbs and rest, avoiding putting weight or pressure on it.

Injuries • Bludgeoning • Pummeling Painscape

Injury Card

Pummeling Painscape

The relentless pummeling transforms your body into a landscape of pain, where every contour is etched with the memory of each blow. Navigating this unforgiving painscape becomes a test of endurance, as you seek respite from the ceaseless assault.

Treatment

Utilizing pain management techniques and seeking medical evaluation for internal injuries are crucial in navigating the pummeling painscape. Rest and gentle stretching can aid in easing muscle soreness and tension.

Details

  • Category: Bludgeoning

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 5 Hit Points

  • Duration: 60

  • Status Effect: Stunned

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

Injuries • Bludgeoning • Skin Canvas

Injury Card

Skin Canvas

Each strike leaves a vivid mark on your body, painting a picture of your bruised and battered state. It's as if you've become a canvas for the artistic expressions of those wielding blunt weapons, showcasing a palette of purples and blues.

Treatment

Applying cold compresses and gentle massages to the affected areas can help reduce the pain and swelling of your bruises. Rest and avoiding further impact can aid in the healing process.

Details

  • Category: Bludgeoning

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 4 Hit Points

  • Duration: 50

  • Status Effect: none

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • treatment: Applying cold compresses and gentle massages to the affected areas can help reduce the pain and swelling of your bruises. Rest and avoiding further impact can aid in the healing process.

  • severity: Minor

  • damage: 4

  • duration: 300

  • action: Apply the Bludgeoning Injury

  • statuseffect: none

Injuries • Bludgeoning • Squishy Ears

Injury Card

Squishy Ears

After a particularly heavy slam to the head, your ears feel squishy, affecting your balance and ability to hear clearly.

Ear Smoosh
Treatment

Gently massage the ears with healing salve and rest in a quiet place.

Details

  • Category: Bludgeoning

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 3 Hit Points

Injuries • Bludgeoning • The Leaning Warrior

Injury Card

The Leaning Warrior

Your body feels off-balance, causing you to lean to one side awkwardly. It's a real challenge to stand straight.

Tilted Stance
Treatment

Practice standing still on level ground and focus on correcting your posture.

Details

  • Category: Bludgeoning

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

  • Duration: 50

  • Status Effect: Prone

Injuries • Bludgeoning • The Lopsided Lifter

Injury Card

The Lopsided Lifter

One of your legs feels shorter than the other, causing you to walk with a humorous sway.

Slanted Hold

Injuries • Bludgeoning • Thump And Tumble

Injury Card

Thump And Tumble

Every strike sends you reeling, causing a cascade of tumbles and falls in a slapstick symphony of misfortune. It's as if gravity has a personal vendetta against you, conspiring to turn each thump into an inevitable tumble.

Treatment

Focusing on balance exercises and stability training can help mitigate the effects of thump and tumble. Resting and avoiding activities that exacerbate dizziness or loss of equilibrium are advised during recovery.

Details

  • Category: Bludgeoning

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 5 Hit Points

  • Duration: 20

  • Status Effect: Prone

  • treatment: Focusing on balance exercises and stability training can help mitigate the effects of thump and tumble. Resting and avoiding activities that exacerbate dizziness or loss of equilibrium are advised during recovery.

Injuries • Bludgeoning • Whacky Whiplash

Injury Card

Whacky Whiplash

You suddenly find yourself unable to walk straight. Every step feels like a stumble and a trip waiting to happen, much to the amusement of your party members.

Bumbling Bumps
Treatment

Resting and avoiding sudden movements can help alleviate the clumsiness.

Details

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 3 Hit Points
